evidence.API_evidence: Multiple SDKs documented including Galaxy SDK, Samsung IAP SDK, Samsung Internet SDK, Samsung Wallet SDK, Health SDK, Galaxy Watch SDK with API functionality
evidence.SDK_evidence: Extensive SDK offerings: Galaxy SDK, Samsung IAP SDK, Samsung Internet SDK, Samsung Wallet SDK, Health SDK, Galaxy Watch SDK, Galaxy AR Emoji SDK, Galaxy Performance SDK, Samsung DeX SDK, Samsung Blockchain SDK, Samsung eSE SDK, Samsung TEEGRIS SDK
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-specific development tools found in the developer portal
evidence.language_evidence: Portal primarily in English with no language switcher visible

coding_notes: Samsung Developer portal provides comprehensive mobile/wearable development resources with extensive SDK offerings. GitHub repository shows 7 programming languages. Testing tools include Remote Test Lab and Galaxy Emulator Skin. Galaxy Store serves as app marketplace. Developer registration appears to be free self-service access. Terms and privacy policies govern data usage. Samsung Developer Conference and Samsung AI Forum constitute events.
